aries.name: Aries
aries.summary: A Mars-ruled initiator who acts before overthinking — warm, direct and bold, if a little hot-headed.
aries.love: Loves hard and fast, happy to make the first move — learning to make it last.
aries.career: Thrives where boldness and pioneering matter; hates routine.

taurus.name: Taurus
taurus.summary: A Venus-ruled realist who prizes security and the senses — patient and dependable, but hard to budge.
taurus.love: Slow to warm and deeply loyal once committed.
taurus.career: Excels at work that rewards persistence and quality.

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.summary: A Mercury-ruled curious mind — quick, talkative and wide-ranging, if scattered and changeable.
gemini.love: Needs novelty and a mental spark; bored easily.
gemini.career: Suited to fast, expressive, multi-threaded roles.

cancer.name: Cancer
cancer.summary: A Moon-ruled homemaker — sensitive, empathetic and fiercely protective, if moody and nostalgic.
cancer.love: Devoted and protective; home and safety come first.
cancer.career: Shines in caregiving, service and culture-building.

leo.name: Leo
leo.summary: A Sun-ruled performer — confident, generous and magnetic, craving to be seen and a touch proud.
leo.love: Warm and lavish; needs admiration and loyalty.
leo.career: Built for the front stage — leading and presenting.

virgo.name: Virgo
virgo.summary: A Mercury-ruled analyst — precise, practical and service-minded, if anxious and over-critical.
virgo.love: Shows love through actions and details — understated.
virgo.career: Excels where precision, analysis and quality matter.

libra.name: Libra
libra.summary: A Venus-ruled aesthete — gracious and fair-minded, prizing harmony and partnership, but prone to dithering.
libra.love: Romantic and equal; hates an imbalanced relationship.
libra.career: Suited to aesthetic, diplomatic, people-facing roles.

scorpio.name: Scorpio
scorpio.summary: A Pluto-ruled force — intense, perceptive and devoted, with strong drives to control and possess.
scorpio.love: Loves deeply and intensely; demands total trust.
scorpio.career: Excels where insight, depth and control matter.

sagittarius.name: Sagittarius
sagittarius.summary: A Jupiter-ruled adventurer — optimistic and frank, in love with freedom and meaning, if restless and blunt.
sagittarius.love: Needs freedom and shared growth; fears being tied down.
sagittarius.career: Suited to exploration, breadth and vision.

capricorn.name: Capricorn
capricorn.summary: A Saturn-ruled doer — disciplined, ambitious and responsible, able to shoulder weight, if guarded and gloomy.
capricorn.love: Understated and committed; takes promises seriously.

aquarius.name: Aquarius
aquarius.summary: A Uranus-ruled innovator — independent, rational and forward-looking, caring about the big picture yet emotionally aloof.
aquarius.love: Needs mental freedom and a meeting of minds; hates possessiveness.
aquarius.career: Suited to innovation, tech and idea-driven fields.

pisces.name: Pisces
pisces.summary: A Neptune-ruled dreamer — romantic, imaginative and artistic, deeply empathetic, if escapist with blurry boundaries.
pisces.love: Romantic and self-sacrificing; needs to be handled gently.
pisces.career: Suited to art, healing and imaginative work.
